title: Bootstrap cruft cleanup batch — stub feature folders and Cursor agent variants
summary: Work package A normalized 20 pancreator-* feature folders by prepending YAML frontmatter to each spec.md, creating stub delivery-report.md and index.json files, and clearing global coverage gaps in lib/memory/features/index.json. Work package B is corrected and reverted: the -standard and -complex mirrors remain in…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, active-work pipeline artifacts, and Work package A normalization surface. After human accepts this index artifact, run pan advance to complete, then pan close-artifacts for archival…
intake.human_approval_note: Delivery report status is human-accepted; index links ship artifacts before complete-stage archival.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
